description: Stylish and move-in ready, this South Austin home offers extensive updates and a backyard designed for entertaining. Improvements include double-pane windows, updated kitchen and bathroom cabinetry, granite countertops, flooring, stainless steel appliances, and fresh interior paint. The HVAC system was replaced in 2021. Open floor plan filled with natural light, anchored by a stunning fireplace.

Thoughtfully updated single-story residence with a roof replaced in 2024, foundation repair completed in 2023, updated kitchen, granite counters, stainless appliances and durable laminate flooring. Ideally positioned in North Austin's Quail Creek area with convenient access to Hwy 183, Mopac, The Domain and Q2 Stadium. Vaulted living area with fireplace.

Within the gated community of The Uplands, where homes are rarely offered, this property combines a private, established setting with close proximity to Bee Cave amenities including the Hill Country Galleria, Lakeway and Lake Travis. Set on just over half an acre defined by mature trees. Outdoor living includes a covered porch and an extended open deck. The layout lives primarily on the main level.

This exceptional 3,480-square-foot Drees home is nestled on an oversized greenbelt lot in the highly sought-after Northwoods at Avery Ranch. A desirable single-story layout with a 3-car tandem garage. Minutes from highly rated Round Rock ISD, Avery Ranch Golf Club, and the Brushy Creek Trail system. Stone and stucco exterior, high ceilings, arched architectural details and plantation shutters.

BEST DEAL in South Austin. Turn key, large yard, no back neighbors and one bedroom could be used as a Mother-In-Law suite. Positioned in South Austin with quick access to Slaughter Ln and I-35, plus zoning to top-tier Blazier Elementary. Spacious kitchen featuring granite counters, island and pantry that flows into the main living area, and a large backyard.

Welcome to Barker Ranch at Shady Hollow, where generous living space and thoughtful updates come together 20-25 minutes from downtown. This 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home offers exceptional flexibility with an office, second living area, flex room and 3-car garage. The backyard feels like a private retreat centered around a heritage oak, with an oversized deck, putting green and cowboy pool.

Welcome to 1806 Krizan Ave, where every major update has already been completed. Perfectly positioned across from the Wells Creek Greenbelt, this beautifully renovated home combines modern finishes with exceptional access to Austin's tech corridor. Completely refreshed interior with new kitchen cabinetry, designer backsplash, new countertops, new gas range and a refrigerator. Truly move-in ready.

2+ acres in Austin with a pool, guest house, and a level of privacy rarely found this close to the city. Just minutes from downtown, this property offers location, flexibility and refined country living. The main residence features 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms positioned to capture the surrounding landscape. Outdoor amenities include a swimming pool, hot tub and fire pit.

A quiet morning bike ride to Barton Springs, a stroll to the greenbelt, and an evening two-stepping at the Broken Spoke; this Barton Hills residence captures the quintessential central Austin lifestyle. 4 bedrooms, 3 full baths in a single-story layout built by Paradisa Homes. Chef's kitchen with Thermador appliances, custom cabinetry and quartz countertops. Spa-inspired primary bath.

Tucked inside a gated lock-and-leave community built by Pulte in 2016, this two-story residence delivers an interior that feels more custom showpiece than suburban home. Natural quartzite countertops with a waterfall edge, Zellige Moroccan tile, statement lighting and custom ceiling-height cabinetry. Gourmet kitchen with premium stainless appliances, gas cooking and an oversized island.

Space, freedom, and unmatched versatility. Set on 3.4 acres in the sought-after Smokey Mountain Oaks community, this property offers usable land paired with incredible improvements. A standout 40x50 workshop offers possibilities for business use, hobbies or storage, complemented by a 30x40 covered parking structure ideal for RVs. Detached 2-car garage transformed into a custom pool hall.

11901 North Oaks Drive is proof that affordable homes don't have to sacrifice character. Set on a generous 0.2768-acre lot beneath a canopy of heritage Live Oak trees, this extensively updated 3-bedroom, 1.5-bath home offers 1,295 square feet with outdoor room to spare. Real hardwood floors, beamed ceilings and abundant natural light bring warmth throughout.

This immaculate 5-bedroom Avana home showcases one of the best layouts in SW Austin, offering a rare dual primary suite design that balances grand-scale entertaining with everyday luxury. Two-story property with wood flooring and warm natural light. Soaring two-story ceilings, sliding glass doors and a corner fireplace. Gourmet kitchen with quartz countertops and stainless appliances.

This charming one-story home has 4 beds, 2 baths with an open living room and kitchen, and is ready for your renovations. Located on 0.335 acres with a large attached garage, big private back yard, screened-in back porch and storage shed. The home is cared for and in good condition, but is in need of re-leveling from foundation movement. Investors are welcomed to submit written offers; tenant is a family member on a month-to-month agreement.

Poised for its next chapter in one of South Austin's most beloved pockets, this property captures everything that makes Castlewood Forest desirable. Situated on nearly half an acre, among the largest lots in the neighborhood. Designed for both everyday enjoyment and entertaining, a stunning pool anchors the backyard retreat with an expansive recreation space offering flexibility.

Completely remodeled from top to bottom, this beautifully updated Colony Park home offers the perfect blend of modern upgrades and East Austin convenience. Major improvements include a new roof, durable cement siding, and extensive interior renovations that make the home truly move-in ready. Inside, you'll find a thoughtfully redesigned interior featuring updated finishes, a refreshed kitchen and bathrooms, and a bright, welcoming layout designed for comfortable everyday living. Every detail has been carefully considered to create a home that feels both stylish and functional.

3606 Abbate Circle is the kind of older East Austin home people fall for and decide to keep. Built in 1950, it sits on a big SF3 lot in Govalle, about four miles from downtown, with original hardwood floors, real character, and a backyard built for hanging out. A covered front porch looks over a deep lawn planted with agave and prickly pear. Inside, the plan is open, bright, and flexible. The living and dining area runs into a renovated kitchen with butcher block counters, white shaker cabinets, a farmhouse apron sink, blue-green tile, open wood shelving, a gas range, and stainless appliances.

Thoughtfully updated and well-maintained, this Windsor Park-area home welcomes you with a modern front entry, flexible living spaces, and a long list of upgrades designed for comfort and peace of mind. Inside, vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light highlight the spacious step-down living room, anchored by a painted brick fireplace. A versatile front room with French doors provides the perfect space for a home office or second living area. The kitchen features Silestone countertops, stainless appliances, double ovens, gas cooktop, and a breakfast area with backyard views.

Born in 1939 and better than ever, this Hyde Park/Hancock bungalow serves up vintage Austin charm, modern updates, and a location that does all the bragging for it. At 1,261 sq ft of light-drenched, large-windowed bungalow bliss plus a 400 sq ft ADU finished in 2023, this property is equal parts soul and strategy. The main house serves up 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms, a renovated kitchen and hardwood floors. Step outside and you've got a front yard made for sitting under the trees and a back deck built for entertaining. There's also a driveway and garage, which in central Austin is practically a luxury amenity.

Built in 2003, this Clarksville single-family home on a corner lot captures the craftsman charm of the neighborhood with hardwood floors, built-in bookcases, and a light-filled sunroom perfect for watching the birds. The open-concept living, dining, and kitchen area feels both airy and inviting, with natural light pouring in from the oversized windows. The spacious primary suite features a large walk-in closet, a private balcony with views of downtown, and an ensuite bath. Two additional bedrooms on the main floor share a full hall bath. Downstairs, a bonus room with HVAC offers flexible space for a home office, gym, craft room.

Fully renovated and move-in ready, this beautifully updated Northwest Hills home offers nearly 3,000 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, exceptional privacy, and a resort-style backyard retreat. Set among mature trees on a quiet bluff lot, the property enjoys peaceful treetop views and a unique sense of seclusion rarely found this close to the city. Extensively improved over the past year, the home features a new roof, recently replastered pool, fully remodeled primary bath, updated secondary bath, and numerous additional upgrades that allow buyers to move in and immediately enjoy the home.

Welcome to 6106 Yellow Rose Cv, a rare opportunity to own a beautifully situated home in one of Austin's most desirable and established neighborhoods. Located in the highly sought-after Westcreek neighborhood, this property offers the perfect blend of timeless charm, everyday comfort, and unbeatable convenience. Surrounded by mature trees and classic Oak Hill character, the home delivers a peaceful residential setting while remaining just minutes from the vibrant energy of downtown Austin, local dining, shopping, entertainment, and highly rated schools.

Versatile Rosedale Charmer with prime location, investment potential, and top schools. Welcome to 1105 W 43rd Street, a beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom bungalow in the heart of Rosedale, one of Austin's most sought-after and walkable neighborhoods. Whether you're looking for a forever home, a smart investment, or a central Austin retreat, this property offers it all. Filled with warmth and natural light, this home has a flexible floor plan with gorgeous Acacia hardwood floors, updated fixtures, and a blend of vintage character and modern comfort.

This one story South Austin gem has all the character you're looking for with beamed ceilings, a brick fireplace, a sunroom perfect for a home office or flex space, and a spacious primary suite with private ensuite bath. All kitchen appliances convey. No HOA and a fenced backyard! Needs a little TLC, but the bones are great and the opportunity is real. Located in the heart of South Austin with easy access to I-35, US-290, and TX-1. Minutes from the St. Elmo Entertainment District, Battle Bend Park, local dining, and shopping.

Unbeatable opportunity in the heart of Southeast Austin! Situated on a generous lot, this 3 bedroom, 2 bath home offers endless potential for investors, flippers, or buyers looking to add value through renovation. Whether you're seeking your next fix and flip project, rental property, or long-term investment, this property presents a rare chance to capitalize on a prime Austin location. The functional floor plan and expansive lot provide a strong foundation for updates and improvements, while the property's convenient location enhances its appeal.

This beautifully maintained 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home sits on a scenic greenbelt lot and features fresh interior and exterior paint, a new roof, and upgraded new carpet upstairs. Offering comfort, convenience, and exceptional value, the property also includes a rare 3.25% assumable loan through Rocket Mortgage (contact listing agent for details). Thoughtfully designed for everyday living, the home features a versatile loft space ideal for a home office, media room, or play area, along with a spacious primary suite complete with a private ensuite bath.

Stunning Greenbelt Home in Highly Sought-After Canyon Creek! Impeccably maintained and beautifully updated throughout, this 4-bedroom, 3-bath home offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and timeless style. Nestled on a scenic greenbelt lot, the home features warm hardwood floors throughout most living areas, with carpet reserved for the bedrooms. A grand foyer welcomes you into spacious formal living and dining rooms, while the inviting family room showcases a fireplace and views of the private backyard and greenbelt beyond.

Spacious 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath two-story home offering 2,168 sq ft in East Austin with a low approximately 1.65% tax rate. One of the larger floor plans in the neighborhood, this home features multiple living areas, including two downstairs and an additional upstairs flex space, providing plenty of room for family, work-from-home, hobbies, or entertaining. The kitchen includes a stainless steel gas range and refrigerator, while the primary suite offers a double vanity and large walk-in closet. Situated on a private, fully fenced lot with no direct rear neighbors, the backyard backs to open space and includes a storage shed.

DEADLINE FOR OFFERS FRIDAY AT 5PM. Unlock incredible potential with this unique investment opportunity, perfectly situated in Austin just 15 minutes from the vibrant energy of downtown. Sold as-is, this 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence is a masterclass in architectural character, boasting striking stone exterior craftsmanship, soaring cathedral ceilings, and an abundance of natural light via skylights throughout. The expansive floor plan is designed for an elevated lifestyle, featuring a dedicated media/movie room complete with a built-in bar and sink, a serene sunroom with integrated shelving, and a private hot tub room seamlessly connected to the primary suite.

Cozy 4 bedroom home with open plan, great for entertaining. 4th bedroom could be an office. Upgraded flooring; recent exterior paint; kitchen island added; small storage attic space; upgraded appliances.

Life in University Hills offers a specific blend of mid-century character and immediate access to the best of East Austin. Living at this 4 bedroom, 2 bathroom single family home, with a new roof and gutters, puts you just minutes from the 183 and 290, making the commute to the tech corridors or a flight out of the Austin airport remarkably easy. As you walk through the front door, the first of two living areas greets you with vaulted wood-beamed ceilings and a gas fireplace. This space flows directly into the formal dining room, which is wrapped in windows.

Discover an exceptional opportunity where comfort meets convenience in a highly sought-after Austin locale. This charming single-story residence, nestled on a generous 0.21-acre lot, offers a lifestyle of ease and accessibility. With 1594 square feet of meticulously designed living space, this home provides a perfect balance of coziness and functionality. Located in a vibrant neighborhood, residents benefit from proximity to local amenities, community attractions, toll roads and main highways. This inviting three-bedroom, two-bathroom home provides an ideal setting for creating lasting memories.

Single Story home nestled on a cul-de-sac on a .265 acre lot in the desirable Travis Heights neighborhood of 78704. Beautiful live oak trees offer shade and natural setting. Walkable location, only 3 blocks up to South Congress restaurants and shops. The neighborhood features walking trails, public pool, kiddie wading pool, tennis courts and playground. New, enhanced HEB grocery is 5 blocks away. Easy walk or drive into Downtown in 5 minutes. 10 minutes to the airport.

Beautifully re-imagined ranch-style home nestled on nearly 1.25 acres just 15 minutes from downtown Austin. Set back along a private drive and surrounded by mature oaks and a pecan grove, this home offers a warm sense of seclusion while remaining close to favorites like Oak Hill Social and a short drive to Jester King Brewing. Step into timeless appeal as you cross the charming front porch and enter into an updated interior featuring wood floors, exposed beams, and modern fixtures throughout. The heart of the home is the kitchen, featuring stone countertops, stainless steel appliances, and an open flow that connects to two distinct living rooms.

Strikingly transformed by a comprehensive cosmetic remodel, this Legend Oaks showpiece seamlessly merges sophisticated design with everyday functionality. Breathtaking updates command attention upon arrival, featuring new dimensional shingles, energy-efficient low-e vinyl windows, modern garage doors, and sleek fiberglass exterior entry doors. Inside, wide-plank European white oak flooring stretches across an open, light-filled layout distinguished by soaring two-story ceilings, elegant arched transition walkways, and updated custom trim carpentry.

RARE opportunity in the Estates at Hunters Chase, this is the first home to become available in this exclusive enclave of Drees custom homes in nearly a year! Situated on a quiet cul-de-sac, this executive-style residence has an extensive list of high-quality improvements including a fully remodeled primary bath, hardwood floors and tile throughout (no carpet), all windows replaced, custom shutters, updated kitchen and secondary baths, a 24-kilowatt whole-home generator, a just replaced water heater and much more. The impressive floorplan welcomes you with a soaring foyer and high ceilings that create an open, airy feel.

Welcome to this recently updated 2,940 sq ft gem in the heart of Lakeway, now available for sale! This home features 4 bedrooms, 3 full baths, plus a dedicated office, and a two-car garage. The spacious back deck, adorned with a live edge cedar bar top, overlooks a large private backyard complete with a pool, perfect for relaxation and entertaining. The spacious kitchen boasts a gas cooktop and built-in double oven, complemented by new quartz countertops throughout the house and fresh paint. Situated in the highly acclaimed Lake Travis School District and just minutes from shopping, dining, and entertainment.

Discover a rare ownership opportunity in Q Ranch, a premier residential collection in Northwest Austin. Comprising an intimate neighborhood of only 24 custom builds, this area features properties set along a peaceful, oak-canopied cul-de-sac. This Craftsman-inspired 2-story home stands out as a newer property for the area, showcasing a transitional modern feel with its multi-gabled roofline, striking stone elevation, mixed-material siding, and 2 carriage-style wood garage doors. Inside, the floor plan highlights a blend of high ceilings and rich wood accents. The central living area commands attention with an expansive two-story ceiling and stacked upper and lower banks of windows.

Welcome to your dream home in the highly sought after Highpointe community of Dripping Springs. This stunning one-story Highland Home, built in 2021, seamlessly blends modern luxury with the natural beauty and tranquility of the Texas Hill Country. Offering 4 spacious bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, a dedicated home office or flex space, a private theater/media room, and an oversized 3-car garage, this exceptional residence was designed for both comfortable everyday living and effortless entertaining. As you step inside, you are greeted by an inviting foyer that opens into a light-filled, open-concept floor plan.
